instruction: 把人力资源情况汇总下

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = '部门'
ws['B1'] = '在职人数'
ws['C1'] = '年内新增'
ws['D1'] = '年内离职'
ws['A2'] = '研发部'
ws['B2'] = 45
ws['C2'] = 8
ws['D2'] = 3
ws['A3'] = '销售部'
ws['B3'] = 32
ws['C3'] = 12
ws['D3'] = 7
ws['A4'] = '运营部'
ws['B4'] = 28
ws['C4'] = 5
ws['D4'] = 2
ws['A5'] = '财务部'
ws['B5'] = 15
ws['C5'] = 2
ws['D5'] = 1
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/hr_headcount.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: 把人力资源情况汇总下
从/home/user/Desktop/hr_headcount.xlsx中找到净增人数最多的部门（新增减去离职），在/home/user/Desktop/headcount_note.txt末尾追加：'净增最多部门：销售部（净增5人）'，保存

include: 净增最多部门：销售部（净增5人）
